name: davepi-plugin-stripe
description: Stripe payments + subscriptions + webhooks for dAvePi. Mounts opt-in /api/checkout, /api/portal, and /api/webhooks/stripe routes; verifies webhook signatures via the official Stripe SDK; dedupes events; rebroadcasts every verified event onto the framework's record bus so audit/slack/email plugins compose; mirrors subscription state into a schema-driven `stripe_subscription` collection so REST/GraphQL list/filter work without round-tripping Stripe. Dormant when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY is unset.
